cypher: MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n.prop_1 LIMIT 10
oracle_sqlpgq:
SELECT *
FROM GRAPH_TABLE (
  "TEXT2GQL_GRAPH" MATCH (n IS "label_1") WHERE n."prop_1" = "value_1" COLUMNS (n."prop_1" AS prop_1)
) gt
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

cypher: MATCH (n2:label_4)<-[e4:type_edge]-(n4:type_node) WHERE n4.name = "Alice" RETURN COUNT(e4), COUNT(n4), e4.type ORDER BY COUNT(e4) DESC SKIP 0 LIMIT 5
oracle_sqlpgq:

FROM GRAPH_TABLE (
  "TEXT2GQL_GRAPH" MATCH (n2 IS "label_4")<-[e4 IS "type_edge"]-(n4 IS "type_node") WHERE n4."name" = "Alice" COLUMNS (COUNT(EDGE_ID(e4)) AS e4_VALUE, COUNT(VERTEX_ID(n4)) AS n4_VALUE, e4."type" AS type)
) gt
ORDER BY e4_VALUE DESC
OFFSET 0 ROWS
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
